svg.style: background-color: #1a252a; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #1e292e; border-radius: 5px; padding: 15px 25px; box-sizing: border-box; border: 1px solid #34495e;

button.style: background: #3498db; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold;
background: #2ecc71; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px;

background: #e74c3c; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px;
background: #9b59b6; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px;

div.style: display: flex; gap: 25px; color: white; font-family: monospace; font-size: 16px;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: white; font-size: 14px;

display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #1e292e; border-radius: 5px; padding: 20px 25px; box-sizing: border-box; border: 1px solid #34495e; color: white; font-size: 14px;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; flex: 1.5;

select.style: padding: 10px; background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: 1px solid #34495e; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; width: 240px;

div.style: font-family: monospace; background: #2c3e50; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #34495e;

label.style: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer;
